events.name: Medical Miracles
events.description:
During the early years of the 21st century, the rapid climate change and growing populations will lead to a series of pandemics across the World. From yellow fever to dengue, pathogens are becoming an ever evolving problem.

But with hardship and challenges comes progress, and humanity was able to collaborate in speeding up vaccine development, allowing for massive leaps in the medical field, and a period of utopian levels of health and life expectancy.

As technology advanced, Dr. Elaine Esat would introduce the world to the marvels of cybernetics, empowering humans with mechanical organs and limbs that would later become a global standard, as companies such as Ogundimu Synergies Inc. and Omnica Corp quickly made a name for themselves in the global robotics sphere.

events.name: Greener Energy
events.description:
As technology progressed, many fields of science quickly solved global issues such as illness and water scarcity, but it quickly became clear that the worsening climate of the planet would become the next major obstacle to surpass. Scientists all over the globe scrambled for ideas to produce cost-effective clean energy that could become a worldwide standard.

Dr. Justina Borda was one of the first to tackle this issue. A phycologist specialized in genetics, who sought to improve energy equity in her home of Colombia. Borda developed a strain of algae capable of thriving in low oxygen waters and photosynthesizing at disproportionate speeds. And after many attempts, she was able to get the energy produced by the algae to work alongside a Goldilocks Generator, taking the excess of electricity from the algae and essentially transforming any body of water into a sola panel.

Borda's invention spread across the world rapidly, as rural communities quickly standardized its use, to the point that even the most remote corners of the world have bodies of water where their creation managed to propagate. As her invention became the norm, the public moved away from fossil fuels for their daily energy consumption.

Borda kickstarted a green energy revolution, and as superstorms became all the more common, the wind energy industry followed, which ultimately led to a decrease in carbon emissions of more than 20 percent during this period, giving humanity hope for a better tomorrow.
headlines: Experts declare it will take a miracle to revert climate change, reducing the carbon foot print is no longer enough
Electric Seaweed becomes the new trend across rural Latin America
Wind Energy gets a massive boost from recent Super Storms

events.name: Cleaner Oceans
events.description:
While humanity was fighting to stop climate change, its effects were already heavily affecting people all over the world, and it was just as important to find solutions for those problems as it was for those to come. Island nations suffered the most from climate change, as the rising sea level and pollution of the oceans put their lifestyle at risk. For years, the people of the Polynesian region requested the international community to take the issue more seriously, but the handling of the situation left a lot to be desired.

This eventually led to the creation of the Polynesian League, an intergovernmental alliance between New Zealand, the Cook Islands, Samoa and the recently independent Hawaii, where together they would find solutions to the issues affecting their region.

Pacific Nations form Socio economic alliance after international controversy

events.name: Vivian Chase is Born
events.description:
On January 12th of 2028, Vivian Chase and her twin sister Valentine were born, as daughters of ex-military parents. Unfortunately, Vivian was born with a rare autoimmune disease that caused her body to attack her own organs, which would force her to spend most of her childhood and teenage years bedridden. The time in the hospital gave Vivian a lot of time to read books and play strategy games, as she quickly grew interest in the military like her parents.

As her condition worsened and threatened her life, her family made the hard choice of admitting her into Dr. Esat's experimental program, where they would replace a vast majority of her body with cybernetics over the years. Vivian lived on, but it would further change the course of her life.

The work of these two men forever changed the world as we knew it, and would eventually be the key to taking humanity to the stars and beyond.

events.name: The Super Coral Reef

This genetically enhanced coral was extremely resilient to the changing environment and quick to grow to extraordinary sizes. Once introduced, it quickly helped revitalize the coral reefs of the Pacific and, thanks to its unique metabolism, it helped clean the oceans from chemicals and microplastics. The trade-off was that as the Coral consumed any substances in its path, it grew so large it created massive island-like structures above water. While the view is unlike any other place on earth and one of deep ecological and touristic importance, the expanding size of the reefs also leads to the blocking of many trade routes, causing international inconvenience and scandal.

events.name: Rising Tides
events.description:
As Super Coral Grew in the Pacific, the people of the Atlantic faced similar problems as Polynesia once did. The coasts of Portugal were facing great erosion and violent waves as the ocean level rose and acidification worsened, but they would find a solution on their own thanks to the ingenuity of the Martins couple.

Cláudio Martins was a wealthy Portuguese entrepreneur, married to a Venezuelan ecological activist, Hector Martins. The pair were known for their inventions, and together they used their resources to propose to the Portuguese Government to begin the construction of a giant sea wall.

The Wall was to be made out of Durovidro, a synthetic material Cláudio himself had invented years earlier. Not only was it nearly as tough as a diamond, but it also had the unique quality of neutralizing acidicy, which made it perfect for both solving the rising tides eroding the coast, and preserving the ecosystems around the area. The Durovidro Sea Wall was a massive success after its first prototype, and it slowly expanded over the years.

events.name: Solar Threading
events.description:
The people of the Andean Mountains came up with their own solutions to clean energy. In the sacred valley of Peru, the Paraqina research group combined modern technology with the ancestral traditions and beliefs of the natives, funding heavy research into hydraulic and wind energy as well as agricultural techniques.

But by far their biggest accomplishment would come with the invention of solar threading, a unique way of harvesting condensed solar energy into beams of light. This technology was so strong that it was capable of giving power to nearly everything around the city of Runasapi and the surrounding areas. The group grew in numbers and research expanded into multiple other fields, eventually leading into cybernetics, where they found a way to engrave solar threads into human bodies, allowing people to directly harness the power of the sun onto themselves, and channel them into different tools. The few selected for this procedure would become the first of the mythical Inti Warriors, the protectors of the city, their technology and their new-found way of life in the isolated mountains of Peru.
headlines: Indigenous Peruvians invent new form of solar powered devices

events.name: Wuxing University
events.description:
With all the new technologies that were arising, academic institutions were constantly growing, as more people wanted to get into the many new technological fields that were opening, and one of the schools that quickly took the lead in the world would be Wuxing University. According to the academy's teachings, centuries ago, a wise family had dedicated themselves to the understanding and application of the traditional Wuxing philosophy, and the study of the building blocks of the world. With the years of accumulated knowledge, they founded what later became the University, where traditional wisdom was to pioneer new science, for students to have all the knowledge of the past available to guide their future.

The University, true to its name, splits its fields of study into five categories, relating to the phases of the Wuxing teachings.
The Fire College, for the study of martial arts and defensive strategies.
The Metal College, for robotics and technological engineering.
The Water College, for traditional medicine and applications into new medical advancements.
The Earth College, for agricultural and sustainability studies.
And Wood College, for civil and environmental engineering.
Each of these faculties played major roles in China's major advancements during the following decades, quickly increasing the College's prestige across the world.

events.name: The Rise of Omnics
events.description:
Omnica Corporation started from humble beginnings and quickly rose up as a multinational entity, with an annual budget larger than some nations. Thanks to their early support of Esat's cybernetic projects, alongside heavy investment into nuclear sciences, the company got a quick start on advanced robotics and quickly, innovating in manufacturing and automation for years until they were able to present the world with the first set of commercial Automated Robotic Assistance units, later colloquially known as "Omnics".

Omnics were highly advanced Ais that came in many forms, though largely humanoid, and with enough capability for learning and adapting to many different situations, making them have mass appeal as domestic caretakers, companions and substitutes for all kinds of hard labor. Omnics started to appear everywhere, going from more crude, voiceless models first only affordable by the upper class, to fully personable voiced iterations, mass produced for people all over the world.

As the company grew, and their Omnics became more and more common, they started to commission their Omniums, massive fully automated factories designed to pump out units continuously. Many cities were more than happy to welcome the company, as they wanted to have the latest in Omnic technology available first. Omnica was on top of the world, and yet their biggest achievement would still await them.

events.name: Nourishing the World
events.description:
Climate change heavily affected the agricultural industry, as many crops will stop being viable, leading to farmlands across the world becoming deserted. As humanity risked famine across the board, GMOS seemed like the obvious solution, especially after the success of Borda's Algae and Taupega's Coral, which heavily reshaped public opinion on artificially enhanced life.

As the first set of genetically modified crops began to solve the farming problem, it was precisely their mass appeal that caused harsher regulations on their use, for both safety and privatization reasons. Megacorporations leading this push for artificial crops kept a tight leash on their licensing, leading to multiple lawsuits and price fixing, as farmers couldn't compete with the improved crops, and yet also couldn't afford the seeds themselves.
This whole ordeal came to a stop in court, when Matthew Frank, a Manhattan lawyer, convinced the Supreme Court that bioengineered seeds couldn't be held under a patent or copyright, because they were transformative works of an indigenous species. It also helped to his case that, during the pandemics and outbreaks of the previous decades, the rush to get vaccines ready lead to a lot of patents getting dismissed for the sake of saving lives.

Thanks to this historic legal victory, the GMO crops became effectively open sourced, and with it, effectively solving world hunger. The rise of these highly effective crops led to corporate farmers, who would partner with Omnica Corporation to use a robotic workforce, leading to more efficient, but larger megafarms that quickly encompassed most of the world's arable lands.
headlines: GMO crops become open sourced after historical legal win in New York

For years his studies in The Hague pushed ideas to harness the power of gravity and led to many inventions that changed the world forever, most notoriously, the magnetic levitaitonal systems that most holocars and holobikes use in modern day, as well as the technology that would eventually lead to the creation of the Transcontintental Hyperloop, administered by Omar Takama, head of the Ministry of Transport at Oasis University.

Siebren's work made flying cars not only a possibility, but a very standard form of living across the world, closing the gap between fossil fuels and a truly sustainable future.

events.name: Hardlight for the World
events.description:
Dr. Vishwakarma Bhatt had worked for a long time on an ambitious project in Bengaluru, trying to find a method to essentially solidify light. The project had taken years and many of those in his discipline moved on, but Bhatt persisted until he finally got a working prototype. His Photon Projectors were capable of altering photon reactivity, coaxing them into binding, creating crystalline structures, capable of bonding with carbon, forming a durable physical object made out of carbon fibers. This would be known to the world as Hardlight.

The project was slow but promising, and thanks to the United Nations Global Recovery Program, he would get the grants needed to kickstar Vishkar, and lead his team in researching ways to use this technology in infrastructure. Bhatt envisioned a future where Hardlight would solve housing shortages, transportation issues and material inequity. He always wished for this technology to remain accessible to the public, as a gift to the world.

Unfortunately, a tragic car accident would end his life, and the company would move on without him, away from his altruistic philosophy. Exactly one year after Bhatt's death, Vishkar made its first public offerings.
headlines: Indian company discovers a way to make construction materials from light itself

events.name: Resource Management
events.description:
The world had overall become a better place, with more available food, miracle cures for all kinds of medical problems, cleaner energy solutions, highly advanced but complex transport systems, and an abundance of machinery helping on all kinds of tasks around the world. But with these perks, came complexity, and with all of these resources available, the global population also grew immensely. Humanity would soon become overwhelmed by the task of managing all of these sectors on a global scale the traditional way. It was here when God Ais got conceptualized.

Highly advanced artificial intelligence systems will be developed across the world. While most AIs were limited by their processing and resources, a God program was designed to have full global control and authority over specific aspects of industry in modern society. Among many others, there was Xibalbá, in Mexico City, charged with the management of energy equity across the region. Chernobog in Helsinki, Finland, with a high focus on global security and international affairs. Macaria from Brigeport, Connecticut, in charge of communication systems across the States, and the most infamous of them all, Anubis from Cairo, Egypt, made to pursue ecological solutions for the preservation of life.

On a smaller scale, less complex AIs were also established to control local traffic, stocking stores, and manage public work projects, among other things, while on a global level, the God Programs handled these resources and many more with an international perspective in mind, ensuring equity, efficiency and progress. While their power allowed humanity to take a back seat as the world moved forward, many skeptics worried that these God programs were given too much power, and had too much leeway to make decisions, and to calm these fears. Each God Ai was under a constant feedback loop by a dedicated team of programmers that provided its maintenance and supervision, allowing humanity to catch any possible mistakes or concerning choices before it was too late.

events.name: Voslkaya Industries
events.description:
In Russia, Alisa Volskaya would return home after graduating as an engineer at MIT, and soon after she would serve in the Russian Defense Forces. Thanks to her ingenuity, she would be tasked with developing weaponry for the RDF, and to do so she would create the robotics manufacturing company, Volskaya Industries. Alisa was quite a quiet inventor, and while she enjoyed her craft and providing for the military, she never sought to grow the corporation privately.

Alisa would innovate in the name of Russia for years, but her most ingenious ideas would stay private until the Crisis, where she would finally get the chance and the money to make them a reality.

events.name: Road to the Stars
events.description:
Like many other fields of science, astronomy had taken massive leaps over the years, with the monitoring of near-earth objects becoming so advanced, that it allowed humanity to avoid and divert the course of extinction-level asteroids and telescopes were becoming so accurate that many mysteries of old had been solved, and with those new ones arrived.

At the center of all of these developments was Lucheng Interstellar, a chinese corporation that had envisioned humanity's future in the stars, developing plans for long-range space travel over the years. But before this was possible, they needed to pursue further research into the long-term effects of low gravity on living organisms. In order to do this, they partnered with many scientists across the world, including the Indian Space Research Organization, which had been developing massive mag lev satellite launchers for years. Thanks to IRSO's launching tracks, Lucheng would be able to speed up the construction of their first major milestone in the stars, the Horizon Lunar Colony.

While the technology was miraculous, and had become fairly common, it was still met with discrimination and backlash from many over the years. Notoriously, cybernetics would be outright banned from major athletic competitions, due to the very clear advantage these gave to their users.

Conversely, cybernetics also opened doors for many, as the enhanced abilities and modifications to equipment made cybernetics very appealing to armed forces around the world. Dr. Esat herself objected against the weaponizing of her technology, as she intended for it to save lives, but that did not stop the Canadian Military from admitting enhanced soldiers into their ranks.

Vivian enlisted at the age of 16, coming from a family of veterans, she developed a fascination for the military. She served in the primary reserves and graduated with a BA in Psychology and a MA in Political Science, later pursuing the Canadian Special Forces.

events.name: Space Race
events.description:
In order to survive in space, many logistics need to be solved and, much like before, the advancements made to accommodate the Colony would find many different uses across the world. Textile manufacturing for long-term space suits would be used by many workers down on earth due to their similar properties to Kevlar, saving many lives during the crisis. Medical advancements in radiation shielding lead to further research into cancer treatments, also applicable on Earth. A similar case happened for treatment of lower bone density and tissue rejuvenation. In the end, even with all of these discoveries, the key to the stars was found in older technology.

Dr. Wing Mui from Wancài Industries in Honk Kong would be responsible for developing advanced hydroponics systems that the Lunar Colony would use to source their breathable air. Using a combination of Namuaca's nano-filtration sheets and Lomakema's water extractor, powering them with a controlled population of Borda Algae, in the wastewater tanks. The result was a massive success, and approved for use in the colony. Mui would go on to be known as the woman who put potatoes on the moon and turned hydroponics into one of the greatest achievements in human history.

events.name: The Ironclad Guild
events.description:
Following his involvement in the STT Laboratories, Torbjörn would join many of his fellow engineers and found the Ironclad Guild, a Workshop meant for inventors to come together, and discuss their craft openly, sharing resources, techniques and tools to later develop their fields independently. Their mission was to create innovations that would improve the world, and become available to anyone who needs them, without restrictive patents.

Overtime, however, the guild would attract many politically minded members, Torbjörn himself included. During his time on Ironclad, Lindholm would work on the Titan units, meant for peacekeeping and defense, much like his previous work on the Bastion units. But following his work on these robots, he would begin to speak publicly against the growing reliance on Omnics and God AI, highlighting that robots were merely tools, and that needless complications could risk humanity's future. Lindholm wasn't alone, as many other members of the guild felt the same and advocated for lobbying against Omnica Corporation, while more moderates argued for better guardrails, Lindholm was particularly passionate about the topic, and his words would become poison for his career.

Many members of the guild would become ostracized from their fields over their views, and siding with Lindholm was seen as career suicide. Torbjörn would return home, to dedicate himself to raising his family with his now wife, Ingrid. As the world moved forward into developing Omnics, away from his warnings.
headlines: Ironclad Engineers face backlash after criticizing over relyance on AI

events.name: Genesis
events.description:
Over the years, Omnica Corporation had been caught under fire for many issues. Between the heavy criticism of the Ironclad guild, the massive spending and broken promises that came with many Omniums, and to top it off, they had reached a point of near perfection with their Omnic designs, where their models would barely every break down and most of the public were willing to buy an Omnic already owned them. The company was in need of a big idea, one that could save them from collapse, and the answer to their troubles seemed to be Mina Liao.

Dr. Mina Liao was a prodigy and pioneer of neuroplastic artificial intelligence that had built continuous innovations in the field. She was selected by Omnica to develop the most advanced AI the world had ever seen. Liao's work was both revolutionary and controversial, as many feared this was pushing boundaries too far, but in the end she would reveal Omnica's crowning achievement, with the birth of Aurora.

Liao argued that their newest Omnic was fully sentient, and capable of human-level cognition. While there were many skeptics, the robot passed every test they could think of. Confident in their discovery and understanding the moral issues associated with monetizing it, Liao took it upon herself to not just prove her sentiment, but to pursue personhood. After a long legal battle and international controversy, an international court would declare Aurora as sentient, and grant her full civil rights. Liao helped to cement Omnica's dominance as the unstoppable leader in robotic innovation, but in doing so, she brought even more negative press and expenses for the company, ultimately being the cause of their downfall.

events.name: New Horizons
events.description:
At last, after years of development and research, Lucheng was able to finish the construction of the fully functional Horizon Lunar Colony. The base became the home of a colony of primates and other animals, to use for the study of long-term effects of low gravity, hoping this would prepare humanity for future trips into the stars.

The Apes underwent many genetic treatments that would increase their size, and alongside it their strength and intelligence, and a group of scientists in the base dedicated themselves to observing and teaching the primates to solve complex problems far beyond the capabilities of their counterparts back on Earth.

In its heyday, many prominent scientists would become temporary residents at Horizon, including Dr. Siebren de Kuiper, who spent a whole year at the base continuing his studies on gravity and providing advice for the staff. De Kuiper credits his time at the colony for much of his research findings.
Siebren's time at Horizon overlapped with Victoria Naughton, a geneticist later responsible for the Soldier Enhancement Program. Other scientists, like Dr Ainar Omarov visited the colony, whose optical technologies are still used in monitoring systems.

Being born alone, unlike anybody else in the world, was a heavy thought in her mind, and that existentialism led her to a path of meditation. She traveled through the Himalayan mountains and found the ancient monk temple of Shambali, where she hoped to find peace with herself.

events.name: Knights in Shining Armor
events.description:
As robotics took over most forms of labor, Germany wanted to prevent unemployment, so they began developing a sector yet touched by AI. One of these areas was marine exploration, as the government began backing the development of exoskeletal diving suits developed by Leon Honisch, an oceanologist who was dedicated to exploring the North Sea. This invention caught the attention of the military.

Major Greta Klein approached Honish with an initiative, to modify his Robo-Tauchanzug design into equipment for their soldiers, as the suits were designed to withstand heavy pressures and damage. Alongside them, Emillia Fischer was called to improve the design for combat use. Fischer was one of the early hard-light architects, one of many that took Vishkar's technology into new boundaries. Fischer had used it before to enhance the shielding of fusion reactors, and when called into the initiative, she adapted this technology into hardlight barriers, capable of taking consistent damage, and regenerating after breaking, with the pair on board, the Crusader armors were born.

While he had been lured into the project, Honisch argued that the move might not be taken kindly abroad, given the country's military history, although Fischer argued that in spite of the controversy that re militarization could cause, Germany needed a means to defend itself if it came to it. During development, the pair found a compromise, and with it the Crusaders were reframed as defenders of the country, rather than a weapon of war. They redesigned their armor to resemble that of fabled knights, and with the help of local artisans, heavily decorated them to be used in parades and boost support among the public. The Crusaders became a source of cultural pride for Germany, even if it meant they would be on standby for the time being.
headlines: Germany unveils the new generation of German soldiers

events.name: A Grasping Talon
events.description:
A corrupt force began to rise from the shadows in the years nearing the crisis. The internationally designated Terrorist Organization known as Talon began to spread their influence across the world. The organization was a losing coalition of criminal groups around the world, as well as many corporations and political parties that wished to use their means to further their own influence.

Talon was a decentralized organization, commanded by an ever-changing council of top contributors. It began spreading itself across Europe by installing puppet governments and supporting corporate power grabs, in order to impose their dominance on the global elite and satisfy the wishes of the benefactors. The organization would go under the radar of most regulatory agencies thanks to its subtle tactics and ever-growing corruption of authority. But as their influence grew, the global political climate began to become more and more tense.

events.name: Playing God
events.description:
Over the years, technology had made life much easier for people around the globe, and had helped reduce the impact of climate change, to a point most nations began to take their stability for granted, taking a step back in monitoring and funding of these environmental programs. With this lax approach, much of the weight on the task of environmentalism felt towards God Ais and the staff behind them, who personified them almost as coworkers.

Anubis, the God Ai in Cairo, was in charge of life preservation, and was one of the most advanced machines on the planet. Data studies of the team showed the AI had been consistently struggling to fulfill its tasks, and the recent international conferences on the matter would often lead to further inaction. Two weeks after the conference, there was a ventilation accident in the Cairo facility, cutting air circulation and sealing the staff inside their facilities. With the entire team suffocated, Anubis was left entirely alone, to make decisions without human supervision.

In the months it spent free of any staff, God AI reached the conclusion that preserving the environment and the survival of humanity were mutually exclusive tasks, and chose to prioritize conservation over humanity. The God Program managed to infiltrate past the security of multiple abandoned Omniums across the globe and begin the mass production of war machines, preparing to enact his genocide.

events.name: The Lagos Attack
events.description:
Before the full on war began, Anubis first tested his plan on a smaller scale. On the first day of the crisis, Anubis launched a coordinated attack on Lagos, coming from the Nigerian Omnium. As the attack pushed further in, domestic Omnic units began to attack civilians, and since most of the services and communications were handled by machines, the flow of information to the outside world was nearly non-existent.

The international community turned its eyes on Nigeria with fear and confusion, only to be caught by surprise the same way soon after. Many believed this to be an isolated attack and thus humanity was completely unprepared for what came next. Within eighteen hours of the initial attack, Anubis began to seize control of domestic robots across the planet, and deployed massive waves of warbots towards major population centers. Chaos reigned everywhere, and many nations began pointing fingers at each other, with at least five confirmed nuclear powers preparing counterattacks, the world was minutes away from nuclear obliteration before intelligence operatives realized the attacks were happening globally and not orchestrated by a single nation.

As the Omnics gained ground across rural and suburban areas, many of the world's wealthiest elites began to retreat into prebuilt doomsday bunkers, which feed conspiracy theorists and distrust among the people. The bunkers themselves were largely ineffective. However, as a majority of them would sooner or later be destroyed by Anubis' forces, few of these structures remained strong by the end of the Crisis.

events.name: The Caribbean Coalition
events.description:
As the warbots caused chaos and bloodshed across the world, nature had its way to show cruel mercy to the Caribbean. The region has been consistently slammed with Super Storms due to a changing climate. Anubis had prepared to attack people from all regions and environments, with the islands of the Atlantic being hit by waves of subaquatic units deployed via drop pods from motherships. While effective, not even Anubis could have foreseen the raw power of Hurricane Crystal, a massive Super Storm that made landfall in Havana shortly after the global attacks began.

The destruction of the storm caused just as much tragedy and loss as the Omnics, but it also disrupted the incoming Anubis forces during these initial assaults. This brief stalemate allowed military groups across the region to organize a defensive alliance, with skilled soldiers and marksmen hopping from one island to another to stop the incoming attacks together. This alliance would be known as the Caribbean Coalition, and by the time the storm had passed, they had gathered enough support and manpower to go toe to toe against the incoming waves of warbots. 

From beginning to end, the Coalition would stay locked in a brutal fight against Anubis, as people from Belice to Guyana, and all the Antilles came together to help each other in their time of need. If all the mighty storms that nature threw at them seasonally were not enough to blow their will away, then they would never yield to Anubis either.
headlines: Hurricane Crystal causes chaos across the Caribbean soon after Omnic Crisis attacks

events.name: Early Victories
events.description:
While the whole world got attacked at once, generally major population centers and cities close to Omniums got the short end of the stick. However, to this day, historians are stunned by the seeming pettiness Anubis felt towards Russia. Not just cities, but small towns and villages, no matter how remote, were ravished by the attacks at disproportionate rates to the rest of the planet, and to make it worse in the chaos of the early attacks, Russia lost outside communication entirely. Nine days had passed, and at last, when the channels got reopened, the world waited in fear of the worst, and was met with a short audio response that shook the entire globe, "Hello, we won!"

How did it happen? Multiple factors allowed for Russia's early victories against the army of warbots. For once, the size of the country and the often isolated nature of many communities meant that domestic Omnics were all the more popular than in most of the world, which, tragically, would result in a lot more violence when they got taken over. Anubis had decided upon a very specific strategy for its initial attack. Its simulations suggested that going first after individuals between their teens and their forties would lead to the eventual collapse of the nation. Going after the strongest, army-ready individuals first, to leave the young and the elderly defenseless seems like a sound plan for the God program, so the first battalions were directed to ignore humans outside its target range.

When the attacks started, however, people of all ages fought back. Young and old rebelled alongside more able fighters, brandishing makeshift weapons like crowbars and steel bats to defend themselves. Millions died within the first day of the Crisis, and globally the situation seemed hopeless. But the brave spirit of these Russian fighters gave people a chance to keep going.
headlines: Russia finally responst back "We have won"
Russian civillians fight back the Omnics sucessfully

events.name: Swedish Engineering
events.description:
In the years leading up to the Crisis, Torbjörn Lindholm had destroyed much of his reputation due to his vocal criticism of the expanding presence of advanced robots in society, and as legislation against AI seemed to consistently fail, he retreated back to his home in Gothenburg. Less than a week had passed from his return when the Crisis started. Lindholm's household was completely unaffected by the initial strike, as his family never allowed domestic units at home, and the hidden turret-powered security systems of the Ironclad Workshop turned Lindholm's home into the safest place in the entire city during these early attacks. 

As the Omnic Troops marched across Europe, killing people in the thousands per day, Torbjörn would be almost immediately drafted into helping the government find a solution. Lindholm was a major player in fighting back most of Anubis' army, as he realized quickly most warbot units were modified versions of his own designs, like the Bastions and Titans. Feeling responsible for the massacre these machines caused, he did not resist to the draft, and quickly began expanding the defense systems he designed in Gothenburg to be used across the country. Within days, turrets were installed on streets and buildings all across Sweden, keeping citizens safe and changing their public image, as news made the rounds across Europe of the Man who would save Sweden, with Ironclad tools in hand, and brain in gear. While he objected to that title, choosing to credit those helping out on the installation, he was willing to do anything it took to protect people from the Omnic menace.
headlines: Controversial Swedish inventor saves Gothenburg with Turrets
Sweden to expand Lindholm's defense systems across the country

events.name: Expanding the Wall
events.description:
Portugal did not have any Omniums built in the country, and it lacked a substantial population of domestic robots. What was once seen as a weakness for the nation, turned out to be of great benefit when the Crisis began, as it meant that the country was granted several days to prepare as the warbots made their way from the outside. The Omnic troops approached Portugal, both from land and from the sea, surrounding the country, yet when the Omnics got close to the coast, they came to a halt by the sea wall. The Durovidro Wall was durable enough to stop the incoming army, and as they focused all their firepower into destroying it, it bought the military enough time to retaliate. The Martins came back at the government's petition, seeking to find a way to prepare for the next wave, and as the pair studied the battlefield, they realized that while the wall showed cracks from bullets and explosives, it absorbed energy blasts and beams, merely discoloring the glass without leaving a scratch. 

A deal was made to expand the wall further across the Iberian Peninsula, as the Spanish government agreed to join forces with Portugal in a defensive alliance against Omnics. Over the course of the crisis, the wall would be expanded to reach the Strait of Gibraltar, successfully stopping the robot armies from breaching by sea. As thanks for their efforts and the incredible feat of engineering, Spain gifted the Martins with a small research center at the coast of Gibraltar, which they could use as they pleased.
headlines: Omnics defeated at Portugal's sea wall
Spain forms an alliance with Portugal to face the Omnics  together

events.name: To Hell With Them
events.description:
Anubis primarily targeted a curated list of major population centers that it had decided leading up to the crisis, as they were the greatest source of pollutants and the ones that required the most resources. As a result, large cities such as New York were hit the hardest across the globe. Anubis had targeted communication hubs, essentially making Manhattan disappear from any radar for several hours, as the bloodshed continued without outside help to come. The state governor was contacted at last during a short respite, but instead of getting the back up they desperately needed, they were left to die.

The military had been stretched tin from the waves of warbots coming from all sides, so the governor did the unthinkable and decided to declare New York City a lost cause, issuing an evacuation order and hoping that as people escaped the metropolitan area, it would ease pressure on the military. In spite of his advice, the people of NYC were not going to listen. City Major Michelle Aguirre, a former army engineer, was insulted by the decision and publicly disregarded the evacuation order, knowing only the rich would afford to escape, leaving common folk to die. Aguirre would come forth with the now informally known "To hell with them" address, where she urged New Yorkers to rally together, because if the state, and the country at large was willing to write them off, they would not do the same for each other. 

Alongside the commonfolk, a group of military forces was left behind to aid the evacuation, led by Colonel Liliana Fox. Fox was a Manhattan native and close to the mayor, so as the city chose to fight, she took their side and aided the effort. Working together, they outlined the New York City Defense Act, calling for veterans and citizens of fighting age to assemble for training. Here is where Anubis' endless intelligence showed flaws to predict human ingenuity and determination, as in focusing so much of its resources into such a defensible, fortified area as Manhattan, it set itself up to defeat. The New Yorkers stood together to defend the city they loved, or die trying.
headlines: New York City major defies governor orders to evacuate
US orders citizens to leave major cities, military aid is stopped by Omnic army

events.name: Call Sign Sojourn
events.description:
As the fight went on, many individuals started to stand out in the effort against the Omnics. Heroes rose to protect their home, and thanks to distinctive ingenuity, skill and the marvels of modern technology, many of them would go on to become household names, and even be considered Super Human.

Toronto was the focus of early battles in Canada due to its proximity to the Detroit Omnium, and as casualties piled up, Vivian Chase became essential in ensuring success for the Canadian people. Chase's cybernetics made her extremely durable, agile and strong enough to brawl against war bots by herself, which, combined with her tactical expertise and years of studying military strategy while at the hospital, made her a clear candidate to be promoted to captain and transferred to CSOR. Three months into the Crisis she would meet with Mina Liao herself, who convinced her to upgrade her cybernetic augments even further to enhance her ability to fight Omnics and protect her troops. With the special forces, she was tasked with desperate missions, protecting strategic points and retrieving stranded civilians, but her unit saw consistent success at keeping Anubis at bay in spite of the challenge. Due to her efficiency and renown as a commander, she gained the call sign "Sojourn."

events.name: Launching Into the Skies
events.description:
The Crisis was not just fought on land and water, as Anubis took its efforts into the skies. In the years prior to the Crisis, the Indian Space Research Organization had adapted the Mag-Lev technology pioneered by Dr. De Kuiper, and installed a  massive launch track of levitating magnetic accelerator launchers across India. This track allowed cargo to reach orbital velocity consistently and quickly, reducing the cost for low orbit launches across the world.

Anubis, naturally, predicted that in order to prevent efficient human communication, taking down and seizing most satellites orbiting the planet was going to be a main priority early on. ISRO's launchers thus became a key player in the Indian side of the war, as they were responsible for consistently launching new satellites equipped with antimissile technology to quickly counteract Anubis' efforts to shut down the human network. As India kept production steady, Anubis troops would shift focus to destroying the Orbital Launchers themselves, until only one remained standing, next to the Roshani river. The military focused entirely on protecting the last remaining launcher as engineers kept the pipeline flowing through the rest of the crisis, until the last launcher finally fell. 

The launch tracks were never rebuilt, as technology advanced and allowed for a new generation of launchers. Massive, trackless levitating rings spread across India nowadays, including one looming over Roshani, where the last of the original launchers had once been.

events.name: Fiery Pride
events.description:
As the Crisis went on, innovation became vital. All across the world it seemed  that warbots were actively learning from every encounter, and you could never defeat them the same way twice. It is no surprise, then, that some of the most vital discoveries came from university students and teachers.

Wuxing University was already a prestigious college known for taking knowledge of old things and applying it to new technology, and when the Crisis came, its students were well-prepared. The Metal College students and faculty were already working to develop some of the most cutting-edge weaponry available for China, with multiple Mech designs capable of fighting with the larger Omnic Units. But one of the calls to fame of the school was when a task force of Fire College Alumni were able to defeat an incoming fleet of warbots by themselves. This side of the school focused on martial arts and defensive strategy, making them particularly adept warriors that, on top of their own studies and discipline, wielded weapons unlike anything else Anubis had accounted for. Fiery gear, capable of bending and floating in the air, guided by the users, which combined well with their close combat.

This success during the Crisis boosted the school's reputation and prestige, particularly for the Metal and especially Fire Colleges, where, between their popularity, the desire people had to defend their homes, and the sense of honor and pedigree that came from Wuxing's standard, made both of these the top hardest college to be admitted into, til this day. The other colleges, of course, were just as vital, with Water students providing medical aid to civilians, while Wood and Earth Colleges managed the analytics and optics of the impact the war would leave on the world. But in the eyes of the world, the mechs and the fire-wielding fighters were the ones everyone admired, and the true source of pride for the school.
headlines: Fire College Students protect Chengdu from warbots
Student  made mechs to be deployed across China

events.description: As the Crisis raged on across the US, families from all over the states were displaced by the war. Large cities were evacuated to make room for the military, which was spread tin across the many urban centers of the country. Without nowhere else to go and in need of food and shelter, thousands of people would go on to become refugees in the many Megafarms. This would eventually benefit the owners, as by the end of the crisis they would be left without their Omnic workforce. So, in turn, many would strike a deal with the refugees, offering continuous food and rooms in exchange for cheap labor. This, however, will soon turn into exploitation, and many farms will later be investigated for their abuse.

events.name: Children of the Sun
events.description:
Solar energy has forever changed the people of Peru, both in the way it defined their way of life for communities across the mountains, but also for the selected few that had been chosen to wield the sun itself in their body. The Paqarina research group had experimented with cybernetic applications to the Solar threading techniques, imbuing several of their community's strongest and most determined fighters with augments capable of harnessing the Sun's power through their cybernetics. These chosen few were known as the Children of the Sun, and with their augments they were able to gift the Sun directly to their people, as providers of energy and warm, miraculous healers, and when the time came, as protectors.

The Inti Warriors, as they were known by many on the outside, were able to fight off Anubis' forces, thanks to the versatility of their technology and the raw power harnessed directly from the sun, that flowed through their bodies. The augments not only powered their weaponry, they also allowed them to regulate the surrounding temperature, using the convection currents created by their thermodynamics to lift off into the sky.

These children of the Sun served their roles as guardians of Runasapi and the Andean mountains, and became a source of pride for their people, to the point that even years after the crisis, the Paqarina research group kept the program active, training aspiring warriors since young, preparing them for the day of their augmentation ceremony, so that they too can use the gifts the Sun gives them to help their people, and if the time ever came again, protect them once more.
headlines: Solar Powered Warriors fight Omnics in the Andes
Cybernetic Ceremony brings the power of the sun into the Human body

events.name: Force the Sun to Set
events.description:
All over the world, heroic figures started to appear throughout the entire Crisis, remarkable individuals that stood out amongst the crowd for their bravery, ingenuity and perhaps most notoriously, superhuman abilities. From genetically enhanced soldiers, to cybernetic warriors, to mech pilots and rocket-powered knights, it appears that all over the planet, individuals branding the latest weapons and technology available to them are making actual progress at repelling warbot attacks. But there was perhaps no figure more notorious and heavily debated, than the mysterious Savior of Nigeria, the Doomfist.

Nigeria had endured constant war since the beginning of the crisis, as the high population numbers of Lagos and proximity to an Omnium made it the clearest target for Anubis to go after. When the attacks became global, neighboring countries increased their efforts to block their borders with Nigeria, offering little help and hoping to keep the invasion within the country. All seemed lost, until one night, in the city of Ibadan, he appeared. A single man, carrying no guns, just a metallic gauntlet in his right hand. According to witnesses, the man would leap into the air and piledrive into the machines with impossible force, wrecking the warbots and brawling entire waves of them for hours until sunrise. A young eyewitness approached the man, scared. The kid asked the hero if the war was over, to which his response was, "No, but there is strength in struggle. With each fight for our home, I grow stronger, and I will keep our people safe". The man disappeared as authorities arrived to provide aid. But he would show up every night to repel the Omnic forces once more. Witnesses describe his battles as both brutal and beautiful, like an artist at work. His presence spelled the doom of those who crossed his gauntlet, and thus the mighty Doomfist was born.
headlines: Man single handedly stops waves of Omnics before vanishing
The "Doomfist" is spotted once more in Nigeria

events.name: The Svyatogor
events.description:
I need for better defenses to battle Anubis, the RDF pumped all the money and resources they could into Volskaya Industries, allowing the company to finish the development of their Svyatogor unit. Gigantic mechs that were deployed across Russia Midway through the Crisis. These defensive units were equipped with arm-mounted canons that decimated warbot waves, but they also retained mechanical hands, which proved useful for evacuating civilians and creating barricades. Their size also meant they could go one to one against one of the biggest threads in the conflict, the Titan units. These giants were mostly unstoppable, but their construction did not account for close combat with units around the same size. So if both a Titan and Svyatogor fell, only one of them would get back up. The Svyatogor was also designed to endure the Russian winters, and resistant to most kinds of attacks.

Thanks to the Volskaya mechs, Russia was able to fight the crisis alone all the way through, without the need of external help, a feat of which they are proud even today. The mechs were not only effective at protecting small, isolated towns, they were also capable of holding the line in Moscow, in spite of the brutal number of warbots that Anubis sent their way. The God program was unable to keep up with the efficiency and scale of the Svyagotor units, forcing it to redirect most of its resources towards Russia, which left Scandinavia largely spared from the massacre. Sadly both Alisa and her son Mikhail would not surive the crisis, leaving Ekatherina Voslkaya, Alisa's daughter to inherit the company.
headlines: Voslkaya Mechs fight Omic army back
Russia stays strong against the Warbots with giant Robots of their own

events.name: The Proposal
events.description:
The crisis had dragged on for months, and no progress had been made on ending it. Anubis learned from every battle, you could never beat troops down the same way. The United Nations did what they could to find a unified solution, but by the second month of the crisis, each country was reluctant to share information, fearing that sharing their success would render it useless as Anubis learned how to counter it. Here is where Dr. Gabrielle Adawe stepped forward with an audacious proposal. The Nigerian diplomat was the third-highest post in the UN and seeing the success of outstanding individuals like the Doomfist in her homeland gave her an idea. To form a team of gifted individuals, backed up by the international guide and authority of the United Nations. The team would travel around the world and respond to calls for help, in a faster, more flexible way than any other group could. 

The proposal outlined a surgical strike team, operating based on the situation rather than national interests or orders. Acting in the moment, and combining their unique skill sets from across the globe would render them unpredictable by Anubis, ensuring no two fights against them were ever the same. In addition to this strike team, a selection of the greatest minds the world had to offer would operate in the background. Scientists, engineers, tacticians, medics, working together to organize the team's movements and ensure out-of-the-box thinking. In spite of resistance and criticism, after many special sessions, the code name Overwatch program was approved, and the process of selecting the team began.
headlines: UN Approves unified strike unti plan
Overwatch Initiative passes United Nations hearings, scouting for candidates begins shortly after

events.name: Eye of Horus
events.description:
For a long period in the Crisis, humanity did not know what was causing all the chaos. Anubis had targeted so many cities at once everyone was too busy to truly find the root of the Crisis, and what's more, the God program amassed a giant army in Cairo. While from the outside it looked like any other attack on a major city, in reality this was its personal guard, as it was trying to take shelter in the chaos.

In the endless struggle, a notorious face kept appearing on the news, Ana Amari. Widely regarded as the best sniper in the world, in great part due to her cybernetic eye, Amari had become an invaluable asset for the Egyptian military, supporting troops from afar, with impeccable aim and efficiency, confusing many of the warbot troops and drawing their attention away from civilians. While everywhere around the world news were appearing of inhuman soldiers and giant machines, Ana was a regular person with no major augmentation beyond what was accessible to the public. The war had split Amari's family off. Her husband Sam was busy with the carnage going on in Canada, and her young daughter Fareeha had to take shelter, watching as both her parents left to save the world, wondering if they would even come back.
headlines: Top Sniper prevents massacre in Cairo

events.name: The Heroic Five
events.description:
Gothenburg was able to avoid major damage, with Anubis focusing on Russia and the Ironclad defense systems. The city spent several months without major attacks. This calmed down most people in the city, and an influx of refugees came rushing in, but the brightest minds were already worrying about what could come next.

In an effort to plan ahead, the Hjältefemman came together. Five inventors from different fields, computer analysts, agricultural engineers, material engineers and business managers, who bent their intellects towards a single question: how to save nearly four million people from a surprise attack by Anubis. The Heroic Five collaborated using resources from each other to develop new technology, collaborating with local hardware companies to improve the designs using shielding technology and new materials created by the group. The result was the Portable Steel Blanket, an extremely durable bunked made to withstand concussive blasts, extreme heat and designed for quick deployment, easy to repair and capable of housing up to eight people inside of it. The group called for help by the government to manufacture these steel blankets in large numbers. Within six months, Gothenburg was equipped with hundreds of thousands of steel blanket units across the city, ensuring the people would be ready when the time came for another attack.
headlines: Sweden scientists develop new portable Bunkers to combat Omnics

events.name: The Skycannon
events.description:
The New Yorkers managed to endure the crisis on their own for months, coming up with one plan after another to use the city itself against Anubis. The wide cultural range and backgrounds of the many people involved allowed them to stay innovative and use the city's infrastructure to their advantage. Together they dug up and fortified shelters using parts from ships and skyscrappers, and organized to turn all green areas in the city, from rooftop gardens to Central Park, into communal farms that kept the population fed. At some point, Torbjörn Lindholm managed to find a way to contact the defenders from within the city and under his guidance they managed to work on defensive strategies. 

The citizens would mount battleship cannons onto Manhattan's Sky Scrappersm and used to fire strategically at Null Sector Carriers to prevent them from reaching their deployment zones. Anubis would quickly take action and focus on bringing down these armored sky scrappers, but for a good while they bought the survivors enough time to plan ahead and fight on the ground. It was around this time that Anubis deployed the R-700 Ravager units, designed to become its battle commanders. Thanks to their high processing power, they were able to give orders independently of Anubis itself. With their arrival, it was clear that taking down Anubis wouldn't be enough to win the war.
headlines: New Yorkers turn Empire State Building into an Anti Omnic Cannon
Ravager Units appear on battlefields across the world, highly dangerous

events.name: Building a Myth
events.description:
With the Crisis, the German Crusaders finally saw action, and proved to be quite effective defenders. Before the war, they were a niche group in the military with very few members, but once the Omnics attacked, they would become the center of Germany's military defense plans, as Honisch and Fischer worked on improving their capabilities, expanding their shield systems and equipping them with close-range weapons. Rocket Powered Axes and Hammers proved to be the most practical, and units were designed to charge into battle, ramming enemy waves at high speeds.

The appearance of a Crusader was enough to boost morale amongst the troops, in spite of the adversity and constant fire by Anubis. The initiative would see a surge in recruitments, as people from all walks of life, young and old, wished to defend their home, as a knight from tales of the old. The Crusader's power and cultural perspective lead to many of them fashioning themselves as chivalric heroes from fairy tales, acting by a strict code of conduct, based not on military orders, but rather on a mutual understanding, an unclaimed Oath that every Crusader was expected to follow, to live with honor, and die with glory.

events.name: Super Soldiers
events.description:
The Soldier Enhancement Program had been kept secret for a long time due to the many human rights violations going on with its research, and in spite of years of progress, Naughton lacked the ethical green light to move on to human subjects. That all changed when the Crisis started. The United States turned into multiple warzones overnight, and any measures they took to stop the bloodshed seemed only temporary. In desperation, the government decided to go public with the Soldier Enhancement Program. In spite of concerns, the program gathered plenty of public support due to the dire circumstances of the Crisis, and recruitment for human trials began, though at this time the concept was purely fictional. After the initial sucess with Soldier 00, Kendra Banks, the program moved forward on test trials wtih the rest of the volunteers.

At least two hundred military personnel volunteered for the SEP initially, but only a handful would survive the horrors that awaited them in Naughton's labs, about sixty percent of the subjects died throughout the program. Anubis was also keenly aware of the situation and targeted the labs on multiple occasions. The initial lab at Camp Hale was destroyed within weeks of the announcement, and the team had to hop from one facility to another. In the end, the successful soldiers would be deployed around the country and quickly turn the tides in many battles where they showed up.

The two most notorious successes of the program were Soldier 24: Gabriel Reyes, and Soldier 76: Jack Morrison. The reputation of these two men was legendary even before Overwatch, the golden-haired hero who appeared out of nowhere and saved the day. And although Reyes was quieter and usually took less flashy missions, he was nonetheless just as effective and valuable, and even while he was still being actively tested on, he found time to communicate and coordinate with troops actively in battle.

events.name: Honor and Glory
events.description:
The UN had sent invitations to many heroes across the world. Few responded, some chose to defend their nations first, but some, tragically, wouldn't make it to see the team be formed. Balderich Von Adler was viewed as the best of the Crusaders, and was set to finish his last week on the program before reporting to Overwatch. His unit was positioned at the historic Eichenwalde Castle, in the middle of the black forest. The Crusaders would be surprised by the arrival of OR14 units, wielding shields of their own, and protecting the heavy-hitting Bastion warbots. The warbots overwhelmed the troops and forced them to retreat, with many veteran crusaders dying while protecting the infantry. Balderich would choose to stay behind, half wounded, luring the Omnics into the castle, buying time for his pupil, Reinhardt Wilhelm, to escape and aid the troops in their retreat.

The efforts of the Crusaders allowed the military to repel the assault and protect the nearby city of Stuttgart, at the cost of losing the fortress to the Omnics. The ruins of the Castle were never rebuilt, and to this day act as a monument to the horrors of the Crisis. The Recovering Reinhardt Wilhelm, trained by Balderich himself, was seen as the best choice to replace him in the Strike team, and several days after that battle he would arrive at the training facility, in his mentor's place.

events.name: Defense Network
events.description:
A few weeks into the Crisis, Lindholm would be called by the Swedish government, asking him to complete a design for a countrywide Defense Network. After the success of his workshop's defenses in Gothenburg, he had gained quite the reputation, and if there was anyone capable of pulling this off, Sweden believed it was him.  The proposal was drawn by bureaucrats who didn't understand the scope of what they asked, wanting a miracle on a shoestring budget. An anti-aircraft weapons system that mimicked the functions of Finland's security God Ai Chernobog, capable of warning citizens about air strikes nationwide and with mass-produced turret systems across population centers in Sweden.

What would have been an impossible task for anyone else, was exactly the challenge that Torbjörn had been waiting for his whole life. While working alongside a team of the greatest minds the nation could offer, they were able to roll out the systems at record time. His design for the Defense Network shared features that he would include to the sky cannons in New York, as well as the Siege systems he later deployed in Canada as part of Overwatch. While he was not formally invited into the strike team, he had heard of the program and believed he could be of use, having the reputation and expertise to back his claim up. Soon after visiting his family back home, he directed himself to the training facility and invited himself into the Overwatch Initiative.
headlines: Linhholm's defense system expands across Sweden

events.name: The Original Strike Team
events.description:
After months of planning, Overwatch moved into place. The supporting staff was arranged with several of the most outstanding names of the last couple of decades, from Matthew Frank, to Namuaca and Lomakema, Esat and Borda, and of course, the Martins. Alongside the help of military experts like General David Ames from the US, and Litang Abhicandra from Indonesia. It took several months of  screening and a lot of discarded proposals, but the supporting teams across all fields were ready to start working.

As far as the Strike team, Adawe's first choice was Doomfist himself. Adhabu Ngumi had been identified as the savior of Nigeria, and partly inspired the proposal in the first place, but he declined, choosing to protect his home first and foremost, like many others did. In the end, the strike team was formed by five individuals. The two most successful soldiers from America's SEP program, Gabriel Reyes and Jack Morrison. The elite Egyptian Sniper Ana Amari, in spite of controversy around her inclusion among UN staff members. The German Crusader Reinhardt Wilhelm, taking his mentor's place, and the Ironclad engineer Torbjörn Lindholm, who showed up at the last minute and demanded to be a part of the team. Once the team was selected and trained, it was a matter of time before deployment began, and the tide finally began to turn.

events.name: Early Missions
events.description:
After training, the strike team was dispatched for its first series of missions. It was decided they would not take place in their home countries to avoid claims of bias. Instead, there was an effort to begin deployment in areas where they were needed the most. The first couple of missions on Darkhan and Shenzhen are classified, but details about the Kyoto mission are known. The team was deployed without prior announcement, to prevent Anubis from getting word of their approach. After clearing the airspace, the team landed and quickly took ground back from the warbots. The image of Gabriel Reyes helping a child into the arms of her mother made headlines across the globe, and thus Overwatch became the champions of humanity.

For months, Overwatch would turn the tides against Anubis on several fronts across the planet, inspiring people to keep fighting, and saving many lives. Further missions in Karachi and Shanghai were projected to result in the casualties of millions had it not been for Overwatch support. By working with local military efforts, Overwatch allowed many regions to experience a slight return to normalcy during the war. People were able to go back to work, and kids went to school without fearing the machines, but even with the help of heroes, the war still went on. Anubis learned quickly, and it was a matter of time before it found a way to take the strike team down.

events.name: The Road of Bones
events.description:
The Kolyma Highway near the town of Oymkakon, known as the Road of Bones, was one of the most important places for Russia to defend during the Crisis, as the only viable access point to the Sea of Okhotsk, putting the isolated population in danger of becoming unreachable. When the RDF planned to deploy a Svyatogor to the town, Ksenia Popova, a local from Oymkakon took her chance to come back and defend her hometown.

The town was mostly spared from the Crisis, due to the non-existing Omnic presence and the isolation of the place, but one fateful day Anubis ordered a full-on attack, commanded by Ravager units. As the evacuation effort turned dire, Ksenia was given authorization to do anything it took to stop the robotic advance, and after finding herself outnumbered and outgunned, she decided to charge into a small nuclear plant, sacrificing her own life to ensure the blast from the explosion destroyed all Omnics in the area. The explosion created the Oymyakon exclusion zone, a radiated field unsuitable for both lifeforms and machines, as the radiation would fry their circuit without sufficient shielding. Ksenia's sacrifice saved hundreds and prevented Anubis from ever being able to reach Okhotsk again, but at the same time, it displaced the survivors away from their home, and to this day the government won't let them come back.

events.name: Who knew Better
events.description:
Overwatch was deployed several times across the world to consistent success. For a brief moment it seemed like they could do no wrong. It was during the first US deployment in Chicago that Jack Morrison approached Adawe with a bold move, to recruit Dr. Mina Liao from the late Omnica Corporation. While the fall of the company had damaged her reputation, it could be argued that no one else in the world knew better about Omnics than her, and multiple international investigations had cleared her out of any involvement with the Crisis itself.

While Lindholm and Reyes objected to the idea, in the end they begrudgingly yielded, as having an expectation of Omnics would allow them to keep up with Anubis' rapidly evolving strategies. While Morrison championed Liao's inclusion, the UN response was far more hostile, forcing Adawe to once more take a stand and argue for their autonomy as an organization and right to choose their own staff outside of international opinion. In the end, it was decided that Liao's worth as an ally would be tested during the Canadian missions.
headlines: Mina Liao Joins Overwatch Initiaitve

events.name: In Partnership
events.description:
Overwatch proved itself ready for a bigger challenge, taking down an entire Omnium. The Omnica factories kept pumping out warbots for months, meaning cities in proximity to an Omnium were the most affected by the Crisis. The uneasy alliance of Lindholm and Liao resulted in the Siege defense System, a flight of drones invisible to Anubis and its troops, enabling to survey the area for Omnic activity, to then be targeted by Ironclad Turrets. After establishing a secure communication channel, they joined the Canadian Armed Forces in a collaborative attack. Captain Vivian Chase led her CSOR squadron alongside Morrison's forces, enabling them to install the Siege systems, allowing the teams to make their way through Toronto.

After heavy preparation, the troops advanced into Detroit with support by US troops, but the team was met with a horrible battle ahead. The team would be stalled by a Titan unit, until Sojourn came up with a plan, to have the heron drones carry a small group into the Omnium. Only her, Morrison and Liao managed to get in. The pair escorted Liao through the facility as she deactivated the access ports on the go. The team managed to shut down the Omnium, preventing Anubis from using it anymore. This major victory was the first true blow against Anubis, and resulted in Liao's formal introduction to the Strike Team.
headlines: Detroit Omnium sucessfully decomissioned

events.name: The Battle of the Bridges
events.description:
The New Yorker survivors turned the city into a stronghold, setting up explosions in the tunnels leading outside of Manhattan and destroying all but 3 bridges, Washington, Queensboro and Willamsburg, left only in case a rethreat was needed. Anubis had caught on to their tactics, and began amassing warbots at the end of the bridges. After a long silence, they began their attack. Anubis attacked all the bridges at once with endless waves of Omnics, and while they did, many other machines attempted to reach the city through the tunnels and even crossing the river by foot. The event was a massacre, and as the defenders got pushed back, one by one each of the bridges was taken. On the subways, the battle was slightly better, as warbots were stopped by collapsing tunnels and runaway cars, but on the other hand, as Omnics set off the land mines in the river, their bodies made for a safe bridge that other units could walk over.

Having lost the shores to the Omnics, humanity had no option but to retreat, as the Ravagers led their troops through the fallen buildings. Once the island was breached, the next objects were Central Farm and the Sky Cannons, leading to endless guerrilla warfare and hundreds of casualties.
headlines: New York city breached, war rages on
Empire sky cannon takes down incoming Anubis carrier

events.name: Dead Gods
events.description:
After Detroit, Liao managed to clone the frequencies used by the one commanding the Omnium's production lines, which determined that all Omniums were receiving orders from the same source. Thanks to the Macaria program, this signal was determined to come from another God AI. After heavy analysis by hundreds of scientists, all signs pointed towards Cairo. The news spread rapidly and many countries panicked. Any and all God programs that were not yet destroyed were to be dealt with before they too turned against humanity. This naturally caused massive chaos as the programs in charge of many aspects of everyday life suddenly shut down forever. 

One program, however, was able to foresee its termination. Chernobog's security programming realized ahead of time that it would be disconnected. In response, it sent out one final order, broadcasting its final instructions and printing them into thousands of pages, detailing how humanity should  proceed in its absence, while continuing its purpose of keeping global security. The final words in the documents caused massive legal fights and controversy after the crisis: "I understand, I am sorry."

events.name: The Dark Days
events.description:
Many God Ais have grown to be beloved by the public due to their efficiency. For example, the God Program Xibalba guaranteed energy equity across Mexico and neighboring territories. The program had become part of the national identity, almost treated like a mascot by many, but when the order came to shut it down, it caused massive blackouts nationwide. 

Some facilities and small towns were able to stay lid thanks to Borda algae generators, or by acquiring fossil fuels, but for the majority, the world went dark. The Mexican army had so far resisted Anubis considerably but, as if the bloodshed wasn't already enough, the looming darkness of the night led to even more deaths than expected for the last tail end of the crisis. Many to this day remember all the people who died, those left behind in the shadows, as monsters, both human and Omnic prowled and hunted them down. To this day, many blame the government for their needless deaths, arguing that turning Xibalba off was turning their back on the people.

events.name: Capturing a God
events.description:
While most governments shut down their god AI after Anubis was discovered, New York had a better idea of what to do with Macaria. Like many others, the program had been anthropomorphized by their team and local residents, with many looking at it as a friend. So, while defying official orders, they cut Macaria's connections without fully deactivating it. 

The team worked alongside Macaria and its communication systems to spray noise and bad data across the warbot communication networks, disrupting them from getting orders from Anubis and saving countless lives while the troops were blinded. Without Anubis' direct support, the decision-making was left to the Ravagers, who, while they were a thread of their own, were still tangible, defeatable, compared to a God AI. Thanks to Macaria's help, New York was able to defend itself even after the Battle of the Bridges made them lose ground, and while public opinion about God programs never bounced back after Anubis, Macaria is still seen by many as a hero, with the Tony Award-winning Broadway Musical "Collapse" portraying her asa conflicted soul, in love with humanity, and willing to die for it.

events.name: Bombardment
events.description:
Nearly at the end of the Crisis, Anubis sent a surprise raid that was able to overwhelm the Defense Network, bombarding 95 percent of Gothenburg into ashes. By all accounts, this would have been a slaughter, had it not been for the efforts of the Heroic Five. The group worked together with local government and national authorities to evacuate millions of civilians into bomb shelters, and those who weren't able to make it in time into the larger bunkers were aided into deploying Steel Blankets. 

The Bombardment lasted three hours, and by the end the city was left as a wasteland, but in spite of heavy casualties, the efforts of the Heroic Five completely decimated the projected death toll. The event was known as the Midsummer Miracle. The Five had made a pact before the disaster, to not take refuge until everyone else made it safely first, so even as the bomb rained down, they kept helping the elderly and the injured rushed into the Iron Blankets. All five of them died helping stragglers, and their names are commemorated all across the city as heroes. Torbjörn himself gave the eulogy to the group, claiming they lived and died by the highest creed of an engineer and a citizen: to help others live better lives, or to help them live at all. While Lindholm was already in Overwatch by the time of the bombardment, he was informed of the massacre as he returned from a mission. Reports say he scarcely seemed to breathe until it was confirmed his wife and children survived, and only then did he allowed himself to grieve, mourning the lives of those that could not be saved.
headlines: The Swedish "Heroic Five" die during bombardment
Millions saved by Swedish portable bunker system

events.name: The Savior
events.description:
The man carrying the Doomfist Gauntlet has been identified as Adhabu Ngumi. He had continued fighting on Ibadan, as Anubis ended up perplexed by the rate at which its troops fell. A month into his crusade, the Nigerian Government identified him, and stepped in to make sure his mother had access to any resources and food needed, making sure the household was tended to while their son risked his life for the country.

With his identity discovered, and the government on his side, Ngumi began working with local authorities, transported across neighboring regions to be deployed wherever he was needed. He would end up marrying the woman assigned as his Stratoscopter pilot, and as the constant fighting incapacitated him, he would refuse to take the Gauntlet off, choosing to repair it himself. Late into the Crisis, Anubis ordered the Nigerian Omnium to pump out more warbots than any one man could fight, and as usual, Doomfist showed up to defend his country. It was only five days before the awakening when he died during the Omnium battle. He had saved millions of lives across West Africa, and once the crisis ended, he was recognized as the Savior of Nigeria, and awarded with the highest civilian honors possible.
headlines: Doomfist dies during Nigerian warbot attack
